taglines.fr: Meubles de qualité pour les gens de qualité

description.en:
NEYT is a Belgian family business with production facility in Beervelde, specialised in the production of modern flat pack furniture since more than 35 years.

Very modern, high tech machinery together with an extensive automation permits us to produce modern furniture at very competitive prices, which can be sold worldwide.

Our range consists out of nursery, teenage and adult bedroom furniture, dining/ living room furniture and office furniture.
